title: MAtmos [BTW Port]
description: A port of MAtmos r25 to Better Than Wolves CE
body:
Fork of MAtmos for BTWCE, based on MAtmos release 25 for Liteloader. This port also features the classic soundpack seen in early versions of MAtmos, integrated with BTW's new tools and items.

## Installation
MAtmos requires sound resources in order to function. BTWAtmos currently only has the [default soundpack available](https://github.com/jeffinitup/btw-atmos/releases/tag/res_v1.0.0), and must be downloaded off platform (for now, looking into streamlining this process in the future!) In order to setup a soundpack, extract the soundpack into the root of your ``mods/`` folder. It should be formatted like ``mods/matmos/``.
